metadata.description: Landing page builder, scroll-sequence generator, and Vercel deployer for Claude Code

plugins.name: landing-page-builder
plugins.description: Build and deploy polished landing pages to Vercel from a text description

plugins.name: scroll-sequence
plugins.description: Turn a video file into an Apple-style scroll-sequence website with frame-by-frame playback and choreographed animations

plugins.name: vercel-deploy
plugins.description: Deploy any static site directory to Vercel instantly — no authentication required
